channel.title: Softwares on IID@Yale
channel.description: Recent content in Softwares on IID@Yale

item.title: Software
item.description: We highly believe in open and reproducible science. To this end, we try our best to publicly release our software and data sets. Paper: An Exemplar-Based Approach to Individualized Parcellation Reveals the Need for Sex Specific Functional Network Paper: A Submodular Approach to Create Individualized Parcellations of the Human Brain Paper: Streaming Weak Submodularity: Interpreting Neural Networks on the Fly Code is released here. Paper: Learning Neural Connectivity from Firing Activity: Scalable Algorithms with Provable Guarantees Paper: Probabilistic Submodular Maximization in Sub-Linear Time Code is released here Paper: Differentially Submodular Maximization: Data Summarization in Disguise Code is released here.
